startPoint.en: Speak to Doric in his hut just outside the gates of Taverley north of Falador.
startPoint.es: Habla con Doric en su cabaña, justo a las afueras de las puertas de Taverley, al norte de Falador.

items.name: Iron bar
items.display: 4 iron bars or an iron full helm and 2 iron bars

text.en: Talk to Doric in his hut north of Falador.
text.es: Habla con Doric en su cabaña al norte de Falador.

chatOptions: 1 Do you have any more Smithing tasks for me?

text.es: Forja un yelmo completo de hierro +1

text.en: It can not be purchased off the Grand Exchange or smithed on any other anvil but Doric's, however players can buy an unimproved iron full helm from the Grand Exchange and upgrade themselves to +1.
text.es: No se puede comprar en el Grand Exchange ni forjar en ningún yunque que no sea el de Doric, sin embargo los jugadores pueden comprar un yelmo completo de hierro sin mejorar en el Grand Exchange y mejorarlo ellos mismos a +1.

text.en: Deliver it to Aksel at Artisans' Workshop.
text.es: Entrégaselo a Aksel en Artisans' Workshop.

chatOptions: 1 Doric sent me here with another delivery.
